observation.summary: Run lifecycle terminal result rules were reader-only text while runtime mapped ResultStatus values in terminal_result_draft.go.

hypothesis.summary: A manifest can define the terminal ResultStatus to IR EventType mapping and prove the runtime switch agrees.

execution.summary: Parse result.go and terminal_result_draft.go, then compare status coverage, explicit cases, fallback behavior, and empty-status normalization.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects missing ResultStatus coverage, mapping drift, generated doc drift, and default/fallback drift.

retrospective.summary: Run lifecycle reader docs are generated, while the runtime switch remains the observed implementation evidence.

evidence.proves: terminal ResultStatus mapping manifest matches runtime source
public CI uploads terminal result mapping evidence
